The summary at lines 460–463 should similarly remove the internal activation/range debug output. DETERMINISM IS PRESERVED: the fallback logic (when WHY is absent) remains the same; only the human-readable strings change. Signal activation, ranking, scoring, and scoring policy are NOT touched. changes.check: Output structure — determinism risk from Phase 3 change
changes.result: ADVISORY — changing the fallback title/summary strings in root_cause_compiler_v1.py:459–463 will alter the RootCauseHypothesisV1 title and summary fields for any lead lacking a governed WHY. This changes the text content of the root cause payload, which flows into the clinician report and potentially the consumer-facing narrative. This IS an intentional output change (that's the point of Phase 3). Cursor must document this as an expected delta in the closeout notes and confirm it does not alter signal_state, ranking, or scoring. The hypothesis_id (_WHY_FALLBACK_HYPOTHESIS_ID) must remain unchanged to preserve Sentinel regression compatibility.

HARDENED — all authority paths verified from file content. No blockers. Risk profile confirmed HIGH/MIXED. Key conditions: (1) Branch must be created and kernel started before any file edits. (2) Phase 1 harness refresh is mandatory before any Phase 2–5 work — stale fingerprints at SHA a87df29 cannot be treated as current evidence. (3) Phase 3 fallback fix scoped to root_cause_compiler_v1.py lines 459–463 string fields only — _WHY_FALLBACK_HYPOTHESIS_ID must remain unchanged. (4) Phase 4 must not claim lifestyle visible payoff from the harness fixture (alcohol=7 below threshold) — use orchestrator-level CHECK 2 evidence only. (5) CHECK 6 hardcoded 'homocysteine' assertion must be re-validated after fresh harness run. Cursor may proceed to Stage 3 kernel start on branch launch-core/lc-s9b-proving-closeout.
